item.title: Damn Those Migrants Taking "Black Jobs ..."
item.description: Black leaders in Congress responded to Trump’s comment by sharing photos of themselves working at their “Black jobs”. Representative Stacey Plaskett of the US Virgin Islands shared a photo of her and her colleagues working, “another day in Congress doing our ‘Black jobs.’” https://news.yahoo.com/news/hello-black-job-black-democrats-164140570.html

item.title: Day 7 of Making BG3 Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe cosplay - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.youtube.com/@yuzupyon LAST DAY FINALLY !!! Painting and attachments day :) Thank you for joining me in this crafting adventure! I actually have more educational and funny content of this project that I would like to share with the community : transformation video, makeup and wig installation tutorial, photoshoot BTS and such, what would you like to see first ? :) If you missed the first episodes you can rewatch them on my Youtube playlist here : https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7HkJr8T77ZR2LRnwALisiqCINOlcEbaD And the pictures I took outdoor in this costume will be posted on my IG account if you're curious to see more ! https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon Have an excellent day all :)!
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: I hate this planet
item.description:
https://www.scotusblog.com/2024/06/justices-uphold-laws-targeting-homelessness-with-criminal-penalties/ https://www.scotusblog.com/2024/06/supreme-court-strikes-down-chevron-curtailing-power-of-federal-agencies/
https://www.scotusblog.com/2024/06/justices-rule-for-jan-6-defendant/ https://www.scotusblog.com/2024/06/supreme-court-limits-scope-of-anti-bribery-law/
https://www.npr.org/sections/shots-health-news/2024/06/28/nx-s1-5021863/idaho-abortion-emergency-supreme-court-case-reaction https://www.scotusblog.com/2024/06/supreme-court-takes-up-challenge-to-ban-on-gender-affirming-care/
I'm just so exhausted. Everyone says get out, but my passport isn't up to date and my name change process isn't finished with all agencies. Plus I have a spouse, so that doubles our expenses. Throw on top of that the community that my spouse has. We are both polyamorous. I would be leaving behind one partner and my spouse would be leaving behind two other partners. Escape isn't an option for us. I just... I feel like I can't take the pain anymore. My health is deteriorating rapidly. I've gained so much weight from stress and lack of money to afford medicine or gym memberships or proper nutrition. I just wish I would have a heart attack and it would just be over. Good things don't happen to me. Only more and more pain. I'm so fucking exhausted. Every night I beg that I don't wake up again in the morning. But every morning I continue to wake and suffer through this hell. Sorry. Just so tired. So so so tired.
item.dc:creator: chaosbuni

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i like both? greetings online friends
better than on the seats?
it definitely is
now that is art
looks like Two-Face
we need a new bill to spice things up
it's a chess-ire cat
sure could go for some cocaine right now
mmm hmm
accurate
probably not the first candy i'd pick but they are really good
funny that they are in Plant City
sure why not
i knew that
nope
totally
think i'm going Alfredo
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Panama Papers - June 2024
item.description:
So this criminal system of the rich and powerful that was put in place to effectively steal from society remains unpunished. Taxes are an essential tool that enables societies to build infrastructure and provide other essential services.
The rich and powerful profit from this infrastructure and from workers that went to publicly funded schools etc ... By not paying taxes they are effectively stealing from society twice. Not paying their share and exploiting the results of those who paid their share.
The panama papers weren't completely without consequences. For example one of the journalists has been killed. And don't forget: she was very aware of the risks and asked for protection which she didn't receive.
If there are mistakes in what I posted: please correct me! The Internet is full of half truths and lies and I don't want to be part of the problem. Oh and feel free to correct my English as well, while you're at it. ;-) This all makes me quite sad if I'm being honest. I feel like we need to be aware of these things.
item.dc:creator: Ibringchocolate

item.dc:creator: tolson9

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1059 (Trek Theme Sunday)
item.description:
Hello, Universes, Mirror, and otherwise! It is I, who has awakened, with my green dinosaur to wreak chaos and make all universes wish I had never been born. Fuck the Prime Directive, let's get this bread.
Oh. Oh no. We're in the mirror universe.
This is the most niche memes ever and I fit squarely in this niche like I evolved to specialize in this niche, like some sort of goddamn hummingbird with a beak adapted to a single flower species.
Hahahahahhaaha if you know, you know. Okay, I'll tell. The most racist episode of Star Trek ever.
Pippin tax! Today's messages from Pippin: 1. [Silence, then chewing on phone.] 2. "I love you too. I love you too. Hey I love you too."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: In VS Out of Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— I had an appearance at a local comic expo today and then went out to dinner with my family after, which inspired me to do this little side by side. Can’t take credit here: suit, cape, and bracers (not pictured) made by jcurtis_atelier, mask and belt from Etsy.
Here’s a bonus pic, cause I didn’t have the gloves+bracers on in the other one.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum
